# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL Server. Must be globally unique."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL Database."
      }
    },
    "devPublicIp1": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "First development public IP address to allow connections from."
      }
    },
    "devPublicIp2": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Second development public IP address to allow connections from."
      }
    },
    "applicationName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MyApplication",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the application this database supports (for tagging)."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlAdminLogin": "sqladmin",
    "sqlAdminPassword": "AzureSQL2024!"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "Staging",
        "application": "[parameters('applicationName')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[variables('sqlAdminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[variables('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "Staging",
        "application": "[parameters('applicationName')]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "GP_Gen5_2",
        "tier": "GeneralPurpose",
        "capacity": 2
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 34359738368
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'AllowAllWindowsAzureIps')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'DevIPRule1')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devPublicIp1')]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devPublicIp1')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), 'DevIPRule2')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devPublicIp2')]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devPublicIp2')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "sqlAdminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlAdminLogin')]"
    }
  }
}
